mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_article_versions (article_id, version_no, snapshot, source, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{versionNo}, #{snapshot}, #{source}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, version_no, snapshot, source, created_by, created_at FROM knowledge_article_versions WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY version_no DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, article_id, version_no, snapshot, source, created_by, created_at FROM knowledge_article_versions WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND version_no = #{versionNo} LIMIT 1
